overall_summary: Development priority shifted toward stabilizing the Eliza Cloud Apps data plane and resolving P0 ingress and billing leaks. Parallel efforts were noted in community-led trading fraud detection tools and architectural audits of the Discord plugin.
key_facts: Development team resolved P0 blockers for Eliza Cloud Apps related to ingress routing, tenant database isolation, and port allocation as of June 8.
Four critical billing leaks were identified in the Eliza Cloud Apps hosting model that must be resolved prior to production launch.
User doniyorv7503 reported a technical audit of the @elizaos/plugin-discord architecture, specifically focusing on real-time voice synchronization in voice.ts.
PR #8277 was merged on June 6, refactoring the plugin-lifeops monolith into six specialized, modular plugins.
Steward login in production was reported as broken with 400 errors across both email and Google OAuth flows on June 5.
A manual migration window for AI16Z tokens was confirmed as closed by moderator odilitime.
A pay-per-query MCP server named Cabal-Hunter was introduced to detect coordinated crypto wallet cabals via lineage analysis.
Infrastructure deployment for Eliza Cloud Apps is delayed pending unresolved cloud-init configurations for Caddy and pgbouncer.
open_questions: How should agent quality for open-ended tasks be measured beyond the current benchmarking methodology?
Does the x402 payment usage with MCP servers require further investigation for integration?

new_issues_prs.title: refactor(lifeops): split plugin-lifeops into focused plugins + plugin-personal-assistant
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Decomposes a 7.5K-LOC monolith into modular specialized plugins for better framework flexibility.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(cloud): Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) — per-tenant-isolated container hosting
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Major milestone implementing core infrastructure for secure, scalable agent hosting.

new_issues_prs.title: Steward login broken in prod: OAuth authorize 400 (code_challenge)
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Critical blocker preventing all 'Sign in with Eliza Cloud' functionality.

overall_focus.claim: The project is currently focused on hardening cloud infrastructure, specifically addressing security isolation (PKCE), billing accuracy, and multi-tenant database reliability.

discord_updates.summary: Primarily recruitment and service offerings; doniyorv7503 offered specialized architecture audits and plugin development for a $45k USDT buyout.
Technical discussions centered on Cabal-Hunter for Solana risk checking and benchmarking methodologies for trading agents to distinguish skill from luck.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users expressed a need for better multi-agent coordination regarding sub-agent narration-envelope defects where data is dropped/garbled.

strategic_insights.insight: The launch of Eliza Cloud Apps marks a transition from a local developer framework to a production-grade SaaS infrastructure, necessitating stricter monitoring of billing and tenant isolation.
implications_or_questions: Are current billing leakages minor bugs or fundamental architectural flaws?

market_analysis.observation: Increased demand for on-chain fund tracing and cabal detection in the Solana ecosystem.
market_analysis.relevance: Drives interest in specialized ElizaOS security plugins and pre-swap risk checking modules.
